summary: Initialized Next.js 14 App Router project via create-next-app, installed all required packages (poker-ts, pokersolver, drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, drizzle-kit, next-auth@beta, bcryptjs, framer-motion, tailwindcss). Note: @types/pokersolver does not exist on npm; created local types/pokersolver.d.ts declaration file instead. Configured Tailwind CSS (included in create-next-app setup). Created .env.local with placeholder keys (gitignored). Created drizzle.config.ts pointing to lib/db/schema.ts with postgresql dialect. tsconfig.json already has @/* path alias from create-next-app.

Created lib/db/schema.ts with Drizzle ORM definitions for users table, game_sessions table, and leaderboard view. Created lib/db/index.ts exporting a Drizzle client using @neondatabase/serverless. Ran drizzle-kit generate to produce the initial SQL migration in drizzle/0000_famous_scarlet_spider.sql.

Created lib/auth.ts configuring NextAuth v5 with Credentials provider (username+password, no email), bcryptjs password comparison, JWT sessions with id and username in token, and exports { handlers, auth, signIn, signOut }. Created app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts re-exporting handlers.GET and handlers.POST.

Created middleware.ts at the project root using the auth export from lib/auth.ts. Protects all routes except /login, /register, and /api/auth/* prefix. Unauthenticated users are redirected to /login; logged-in users visiting /login or /register are redirected to /.

Created lib/actions/balance.ts with 'use server' directive. Implemented recoverPriorSession, startGameSession, deductFromSession, creditToSession, and cashOut. All functions verify userId against authenticated session via auth() from NextAuth. Uses Drizzle ORM for all DB operations.

Created lib/actions/user.ts with 'use server' directive. Implemented createUser (validates non-empty username/password, hashes with bcryptjs, inserts with balance=400 and date_last_accessed=CURRENT_DATE, returns error on unique constraint violation) and applyDailyReward (fetches user date_last_accessed, compares with today, updates date and conditionally adds 200 balance if below 200).
Created lib/game/constants.ts exporting the TierConfig interface and TIERS array with three entries (Beginner, Specialist, Master) matching the spec's blind/buy-in/minBalance values.
